attacking_style: Not an attacker profile. Time trial specialist who focuses on individual efforts against the clock rather than road race attacks.
team_tactics: Used strategically by BMC to shield from excessive work when protecting young rider classification. Team balances his developmental trajectory against immediate domestique duties for team leaders like Porte.
terrain_preference: Time trials are his primary strength, demonstrated as only non-Sky rider competitive in TTT at young age. Flat and rolling terrain where TT power translates effectively.
vulnerability: Exposed when forced into heavy domestique work on mountain stages. Team's reluctance to use him for Porte support suggests climbing limitations or desire to preserve energy for TT efforts.
key_patterns: Strong time trial performances at young age, threatening established specialists (2 observations)
Team actively protects him from excessive workload to preserve GC/classification position (2 observations)
Positioned as future talent rather than current workhorse domestique by BMC management (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Identified as emerging TT threat and protected for classifications, indicating upward development curve and team investment in long-term potential
